features.featureTitle: Fix the TanStack Router configuration in frontend/src/App.tsx to ensure the /admin route properly matches when users navigate to the URL https://studyneeds-c05.caffeine.xyz/#caffeineAdminToken=ce5861fcab1733db191f53acf1238a5fd5d097aabfd6c254c5de695de99ec00c/admin - the route must handle the hash-based routing with the caffeineAdminToken query parameter and correctly load the AdminDashboardPage without showing 'your search did not match any documents' error
